entrecote-recipe-with-cafe-de-paris-sauc.name: Topcaôte Recipe With Cafe De Paris Sauce
entrecote-recipe-with-cafe-de-paris-sauc.original_name: Cafe De Paris Soslu Antrikot Tarifi

ingredients.item: 1 tbsp worcestershire sauce (yoxa beer drop vinegar)

instructions: 1. From the refrigerator ç the remove room temperature, for 15–20 minutes to wait.
2. Both the face is salted and freshly peppered.
3. Do the grill pan lush girl in the fire, add a small amount of olive oil.
4. Take antricots in the pan, the thickness of the meat is according to every face 3–5 minutes to cook.
5. Medium Velcro (medium) for each face is enough to cook about 4 minutes.
6. After the meats are cooked, add a small amount of butter to them.
7. Close the movie and list to 4–5 minutes.
8. Wheat butter and olive oil together in a sauce pan.
9. Add thin chopped onion and yellowms and so on.
10. U add 1 tbsp of tomato paste, 1 tsp mustard, half spoon blind, pepper and optional capari.
11. 11. Add 1 tablespoon of worcestershire sauce, 1 teaspoon of lemon juice and 100 ml of cream after a little roasting.
12. Aka&ccedil in jealous fire; make it consistency by cooking minutes.
12. August After January, add fine chopped fresh parsley or fesle.
14 July Take rested antricots on the service plate.
15. plenty of hot Café also visited Paris sauce.
16. Make a stylish presentation with fried potatoes, oven vegetables or buttered rice.
17.  Afiyet olsun.

taiwanese-beef-noodle-soup.name: Taiwanese Beef Noodle Soup
instructions: Fill a large pot with about 6 quarts (5 ½ L) of water and add the beef shank, 3 scallions, 5 slices of ginger, and 3 star anise pods. Cover, bring to a boil over high heat, and cook for 5 minutes.
Remove the meat from the pot, rinse in cold water, and cut into thick slices. Discard the cooking liquid.

In a wok or large pan over medium-high heat, pour in the vegetable oil and add the remaining 3 scallions, 3 ginger slices, the garlic, red chiles, remaining 3 star anise pods, the onion, rock sugar, and spicy bean paste. Cook until the onions start to become translucent.
Add the sliced beef.
Add the dark soy sauce, for color, stir, then add the rice wine.
Pour in the light soy sauce, for flavor, then add the tomatoes. Stir fry for 8-10 minutes.
Fill the same large pot about a quarter of the way with water and heat over medium-high heat. Add the stir-fried meat, vegetables, and cooking liquid.

Add more water until the meat is just covered, then add the white pepper, salt, and bay leaves. Cover and reduce the heat to low and simmer for at least 2 hours, until the meat becomes tender. Remove the bay leaves and star anise before serving.
Bring a large pot of water to boil over high heat and cook the flour noodles according to the package instructions. Remove the noodles from the water.
Add the bok choy to the boiling water. Cook for 3 minutes, then remove.
To assemble the soup, place a generous amount of noodles in the bottom of a bowl. Then, add bok choy, meat, and broth. Garnish with scallions, cilantro, and red chilies.
Enjoy!

tarator-bulgarian-cold-yogurt-and-cucumb.name: Tarator (bulgarian Cold Yogurt And Cucumber Soup)
tarator-bulgarian-cold-yogurt-and-cucumb.original_name: Tarator (sopa fría de yogur y pepino búlgara)

ingredients.item: 500 g de yogur natural (aproximadamente 2 vasos grandes)
2 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra
1 cucharada de eneldo fresco picado (puede ser seco)

instructions: We peel the cucumbers, we scrape them or we mince them very thin and we let them slip a little if they release a lot of fluids. We pat the garlic into a mortar with some salt till we have a dough.
In a big bowl, we mix yogurt with cold water until it has a more liquid texture, as with light soup. We add minced cucumber, garlic, vinegar or lemon, nuts (if we use), oil and dill.
Let's clear and tighten up the salt. We let cool in the refrigerator at least an hour before serving. If we want more fluids, we can add some more cold water just before we get them to the table.

tasty-orange-muffins-teleculinaria.name: Tasty Orange Muffins
instructions: Barre 12 forminhas de queques com margarina. Ligue o forno a 200 graus.
Lay the sugar in a bowl, add the margarine and beat until a smooth cream becomes. Add the eggs, one by one and always knocking, then add the flour, yeast and the orange scrape and beat well.
Divida a mistura pelas formas e leve ao forno durante 15 minutos. Retire, desenforme, deixe arrefecer e sirva.

teixeira-biscuit-teleculinaria.name: Teixeira Biscuit
instructions: Lay the eggs in a bowl and beat them very well. Then add the sugar and beat again, until the mixture thickens.
Add the bicarbonate, previously dissolved in the water, and the lemon scrape and mix well. Add the flour and cinnamon and wrap it in order to connect the ingredients.

Lay the dough in a rectangular form, previously greased with butter. Take it in the oven, preheated to 190°C, for about 30 minutes. Take it off, let it cool down and unshape it. Serves cut into squares.

thai-green-curry-meatballs.name: Thai Green Curry Meatballs
instructions: Place pork in a medium bowl.
Place oats in a mini food processor or blender and pulse until coarsely ground, 5 to 10 seconds. Sprinkle on top of pork. Rinse out processor.
Combine carrot, water, fish sauce, garlic, lemongrass paste, ginger, salt, and red pepper flakes in the food processor. Blend until no large chunks remain, 10 to 15 seconds. Pour mixture over pork.
Add egg to the bowl and mix ingredients until thoroughly combined. Roll meat mixture into 24 balls, roughly 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
Heat coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Brown meatballs lightly on all sides, 2 to 3 minutes per side. Transfer partially cooked meatballs to a bowl.

Whisk coconut milk, curry paste, brown sugar, and fish sauce together in the same skillet; bring to a simmer. Return meatballs to the skillet and simmer until no longer pink inside, 8 to 10 minutes. Season with salt and stir in lime juice. Remove from heat. Sprinkle meatballs with cilantro right before serving.

thai-mango-prawn-salad.name: Thai Mango-prawn Salad

ingredients.prep: chopped into bite-sized pieces, or more to taste

instructions: Heat oil in a wok over medium-high to high heat. Add shrimp; cook until starting to turn pink, about 2 minutes. Add garlic and ginger. Cook for 1 minute. Stir in mirin, fish sauce, vinegar, and red pepper flakes. Add red onion, carrots, cashews, and green onions. Stir-fry for 1 to 2 minutes. Add mango, lime juice, soy sauce, and sugar. Remove salad from heat.
Place romaine hearts on a platter and spoon salad on top including sauce. Serve immediately.

thai-red-rice-and-french-green-lentil-sa.name: Thai Red Rice And French Green Lentil Salad
instructions: Soak red rice in a bowl of fresh water for 30 minutes. Soak lentils in fresh water in a separate bowl for 30 minutes. Drain both rice and lentils into separate pots.

Add 3 cups of water and 1/2 teaspoon salt to the pot of rice and bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, until water has been absorbed and rice is tender, but not soft, about 20 minutes.

Add 3 cups of water, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and bay leaf to the pot of lentils and bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Boil lentils for 15 minutes. Add peas, reduce heat, and simmer until the water has been absorbed or the legumes are tender, not soft, 5 to 10 minutes more.

Drain rice and lentils; discard bay leaf. Transfer to a large serving bowl and allow to cool slightly. Mix in oil, almonds, parsley, and lime juice. Gently fold the ingredients until they are evenly combined. Allow to rest either at room temperature or in the refrigerator before serving, about 1 hour.

the-20-minute-bacon-chicken-i-make-on-re.name: The 20-minute Bacon Chicken I Make On Repeat

ingredients.prep: use the lower amount if your Cajun seasoning contains salt
depending on how salty your seasoning is)

instructions: Place a rack in the middle of the oven and add a 12-inch cast-iron skillet to preheat.

Slice the chicken breasts in half horizontally to make 4 cutlets. Sprinkle the cutlets on both sides with salt and black pepper (as needed—depending on the salt content of your seasoning), followed by the Cajun seasoning. Wrap 2 strips of bacon around each cutlet, covering the chicken completely; it’s okay if the bacon overlaps some.

Carefully remove the skillet from the oven and add the chicken, seam-side down. Bake until crisp on the bottom, about 4 minutes. Using tongs, carefully flip the chicken and cook until the bacon is crispy and the chicken is cooked through, 5 to 6 minutes. If your chicken breasts were large, you may need to cook them longer, up to 5 to 10 more minutes or until the internal temperature reaches 71°C. Love the recipe? Leave us stars and a comment below!

the-fried-egg-recipe-comedera.name: The Fried Egg: Recipe
instructions: Since we have advanced this, you're gonna have to have a good anti-stick frying pan so that the eggs aren't gonna stick. It's also best to be profound, to concentrate enough heat, which will help to cook the egg well from the top. If you have the frying pan in your hand, step 1's ready.

The following is to add an abundant jet of oil. Do not spare while using this ingredient because this can play against the quality of egg cooking. The ideal thing is that with a good hot oil layer (at least a finger with a thickness), when the egg falls into it goes cooking from the bottom and up.

Now we have to light up the kitchen so that the oil goes up. Ideally, put them at a temperature of 180 degrees Celsius and do not add an egg till the oil's hot enough. To know that the oil already has this temperature, by adding a little water drop, you have to start to spark. Another way of knowing that oil's at the right temperature, is that it's about to start smoking. To fry the egg soon, so as to stop the oil from burning.

At the moment of napping the egg, think about your skills to get it to fall whole, without the yellow part losing its circular form. If it's delicate enough, you can break the skin with a dry blow to the frying pan's edge and pour the contents onto the oil without high height, to reduce the risks that the egg will end up scattering. If you have no practice caressing eggs, you can break the shell against a bowl and put it as close to the bottom as you can so that the yolk doesn't end up mixed with clear. Then get as far to oil as you can (with care, of course) and pass the egg from the bowl to the frying pan with a great deal of delicacy but without being as slow as to be broken.
When the egg falls onto hot oil, the white contour of the light will start to be drawn soon.

Cover the frying pan with a cover, preferably clear, so you can supervise the egg while cold. If the oil doesn't cover them completely and eventually you notice that they aren't cooking up well, get some oil from the sides of the frying pan with a spoon, and bathe fried egg above, starting from the surroundings, to contribute to its uniform cooking. That will allow the yolk to be half clear but the edges to be tipple or sunny.

Normally, you'll need less than a few minutes to get the fried egg ready if you have started cooking with the right oil temperature. Depending on factors such as frying height, width and use of a cover, the cooking time can range from 2 to 3 minutes. That's why it's important that you supervise cooking so that you estimate when it's already about to get the fried egg out of frying pan.
To make sure that the egg does not stick with frying, pass it first with hot oil to adapt its temperature, before slipping under the fried egg.
Carefully remove the egg and put it onto a plate. Now's the time to sprinkle him with a pint of salt.
That's all. It's time to eat the fried egg right away, because if it gets cold, the charm of this plate will be lost.

the-greatest-grilled-turkey.name: The Greatest Grilled Turkey

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Remove and discard giblets. Rinse turkey and pat dry. Turn wings back to hold neck skin in place. Return legs to a tucked position.
Brush turkey with oil. Season inside and out with Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper. Place turkey, breast-side up, on a metal grate inside a large roasting pan.
Place the roasting pan over indirect heat on the preheated grill. Grill until the internal thigh temperature is 82°C (85 degrees C), 2 to 3 hours.
Remove from the grill and let turkey stand 15 minutes before carving.

the-new-black.name: The New Black
instructions: Place absinthe in a chilled old-fashioned glass and swirl to coat glass. Combine rye, Averna, bitters, and 1/2 cup ice in a mixing glass or a cocktail shaker; stir until outside of shaker is frosty, about 1 minute. Strain into prepared glass. Squeeze lemon zest over drink to release oils and add to glass.

the-tostada-that-wants-to-be-a-memela.name: The Tostada That Wants To Be A Memela

ingredients.item: Toasted chile de árbol and tomatillo salsa

instructions: Place beans, onion, garlic, epazote, and bay leaf in a large pot. Pour in water to cover by 3" and bring to a simmer; cook, uncovered, until beans are very tender, 2–2½ hours.

Drain beans, reserving cooking liquid. Pluck out epazote and bay leaf and transfer beans to a large bowl. Using a potato masher, crush beans, adding ¾ cup of the cooking liquid a few tablespoons at a time, until a coarse texture forms. There should still be some bits of beans visible. Season with salt. If using avocado leaves, grind in a mortar and pestle or spice mill; mix into beans.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Add beans (be careful as oil may bubble and spit at you) and fry, undisturbed, 2 minutes. Stir and fry for another 2 minutes. Repeat process two more times, scraping up any browned bits. Taste and season with more salt if needed. Remove beans from heat.

Toast a tortilla in a nonstick skillet over medium heat until golden brown in spots but not crunchy, about 2 minutes. Turn; toast on other side, another minute or so. Spread a thin layer of fat over one side of tortilla (about 1 tsp.). Spread 2 Tbsp. bean mixture over; sprinkle with one-quarter of 3 oz. queso fresco. Cook until edges of tortilla curl up a bit and beans are warmed through, about 2 minutes. Repeat process with 7 more tortillas.
Top tortillas with rajas or chorizo and eggs and more queso fresco if desired. Serve with salsa.

Roast poblanos over an open flame, rotating occasionally, until charred and blistered all over, 10–12 minutes. (Or broil on a rimmed baking sheet 8–10 minutes). Remove stems, skins, and seeds. Slice flesh into ½” strips.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium. Add onion and garlic and season with salt. Cook, stirring occasionally, until onion is translucent and softened, 10–12 minutes. Mix in chiles and oregano; taste and season with more salt. Continue to cook, stirring occasionally, until flavors meld and vegetables are very soft, 5–8 minutes. Keep warm until ready to serve.

Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a medium skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium-high. Cook chorizo, using a spoon or heatproof spatula to break up any large pieces, until cooked through and starting to brown, 5–8 minutes. Transfer to a small bowl.

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in a medium nonstick skillet over medium-high. Sprinkle some salt onto the skillet. Crack eggs onto salt and immediately break yolks. Cook until underside is starting to brown, about 1 minute. Turn eggs and cook another 30 seconds (yolk won’t be entirely runny but shouldn’t be cooked through, either).

this-plt-will-be-your-new-fave-sandwich.name: This Plt Will Be Your New Fave Sandwich

ingredients.prep: liberally buttered on one side before toasting (bring butter to room temperature for spreading)

ingredients.item: Of heirloom tomato (enough to cover bread)
Of washed and dried butter or bibb lettuce

instructions: Crisp the pastrami in a pan or griddle to desired crispness.
Remove the pastrami and toast the bread in the same pan or griddle.
Spread a generous amount of Heinz® Mayonnaise on the buttered sides of both pieces of toast.
Place tomato slices on top of mayo and season with salt and pepper.
Layer pastrami on top of tomato, followed by lettuce.
Top with the other slice of toast and cut in half from point to point, so it makes two triangles.

thousand-island-dressing-mastered.name: Thousand Island Dressing Mastered
instructions: Mix mayonnaise, chili sauce, relish, egg, onion, garlic, lemon juice, sugar, Worcestershire sauce, and pepper together in a bowl; refrigerate until chilled.

thunderer-ginger-honey-arbol-bourbon-coc.name: Thunderer (ginger Honey Árbol Bourbon Cocktail)
instructions: To make the Honey Árbol Ginger Syrup: Put the honey and water in a blender and stir until the honey dissolves. Add the ginger and chile and blend on high speed until the ginger is pulverized. Strain through a chinois or cheesecloth and discard the solids. Let the syrup cool to room temperature. Transfer to a small jar or bottle and refrigerate for up to 1 month.

To make the cocktail: Combine the cocktail ingredients in a shaker. Fill the shaker with ice cubes, cover, and shake hard for 7 seconds. Use a Hawthorne strainer to strain the cocktail into a coupe glass. Garnish with the chile de árbol slices.

tilapia-fish-tacos.name: Tilapia Fish Tacos
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a baking sheet with cooking spray.
Sprinkle 1/4 teaspoon fajita seasoning over tilapia fillets and arrange on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until fish flakes easily with a fork, 15 to 20 minutes. Remove from the oven and cut each fillet into 3 pieces.

Meanwhile, coat a large skillet with cooking spray and add corn, black beans, and 1/8 teaspoon fajita seasoning; cook and stir over medium-high heat until heated through, about 3 minutes. Remove the skillet from heat.

Coat a separate skillet with cooking spray and add pineapple; cook and stir over medium-high heat until lightly browned, about 2 minutes. Add onion to pineapple; cook and stir until heated through, about 1 minute more. Remove the skillet from heat.
Pour 1 teaspoon olive oil in a large skillet over high heat; add 4 tortillas and cook until heated through, about 30 seconds per side. Repeat with remaining tortillas and olive oil.
Place a piece of tilapia onto each tortilla and top with corn mixture, pineapple mixture, cilantro, avocado, cabbage, sour cream, and a squeeze of lime.

tinginys-lithuanian-lazy-cookie-loaf.name: Tinginys (lithuanian 'lazy' Cookie Loaf)
instructions: Melt butter in a saucepan over low heat. Stir in sweetened condensed milk and cocoa powder and heat until well combined, stirring constantly, about 2 minutes.
Pour crushed cookies into a big bowl and pour milk mixture on top. Mix well. Pour mixture into a large, clear, plastic bag and shape into a loaf form.
Allow to harden for a few hours and cut into slices to serve.

tirokafteri-recipe-lezzet.name: Tirokafteri Recipe

ingredients.item: 200 gr beyaz peynir (tercihen ezine veya feta)
1–2 green spike peppers (pot level according to preference)
Keçi cheese (more aromatic and mild sour)
Lor peyniri + az miktar beyaz peynir (daha hafif versiyon)
Tulum cheese (for very small amount, flavor density)

instructions: 1. Kö peel off the shells of salt peppers and peels nucleus.
2. Take a rough white cheese, crushed with the help of the veccedil;atal or blender.
3. Add yogurt, olive oil, lemon juice and yellowms.
4. Kö add refreshs and mix push to stay smooth or light grain.
5. Set the pleasure by adding pepper and pepper.
6. 15–20 minutes of rest in the refrigerator of Service before.

titos-harvest-punch.name: Tito's Harvest Punch
instructions: Add all ingredients to a large punch bowl.
Give the punch a stir and serve with cinnamon sugar-rimmed glasses. Let your guests add their own ice, so the punch doesn't become watered down.

tofu-and-vegetable-curry.name: Tofu And Vegetable Curry

ingredients.item: . virgin coconut oil or extra-virgin olive oil

ingredients.prep: cilantro leaves with tender stems, and coarsely chopped salted, roasted peanuts (for serving)

instructions: Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet, preferably nonstick, over medium-high. Add tofu in a single layer and cook, turning over once, until cooked sides are golden brown, about 4 minutes. Transfer to paper towels to drain. Season with kosher salt.

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in a large pot or high-sided skillet over medium-high. Add onions and a generous pinch of salt and stir to coat. Cook, stirring often, until softened, about 4 minutes. Stir in curry paste and cook, stirring often, until darkened in color, about 2 minutes. Add zucchini, eggplant, and green beans and cook, tossing to coat, until vegetables are softened and starting to brown in spots, 5–7 minutes. Pour in coconut milk and ½ cup water and bring to a simmer.
Add tofu to pot and stir gently to combine. Cook until warmed through, about 3 minutes. Season with more salt if needed.
Divide curry among bowls and add a generous squeeze of lime juice to each. Top with cilantro and peanuts.

tofu-green-tea-ice-cream.name: Tofu Green Tea Ice Cream
instructions: Place tofu into a blender or the bowl of a food processor; blend until smooth. Add soy milk, sugar, green tea powder, and canola oil; blend until combined.
Pour mixture into an ice cream maker and freeze according to manufacturer's instructions.

tom-kha-gai-chicken-soup-with-coconut-mi.name: Tom Kha Gai Chicken Soup With Coconut Milk
tom-kha-gai-chicken-soup-with-coconut-mi.original_name: Sopa Tom Kha Gai de pollo con leche de coco

ingredients.item: 300 ml de caldo de pollo (casero o en brick)
150 g mushrooms or mushrooms (shiitake or whatever you have)
3 rodajas finas de galanga (o jengibre si no tienes)
2 tallos de lemongrass (solo la parte blanca, aplastada)
4 hojas de lima kaffir (opcional, pero muy recomendable)
1 Red chili (can be fresh or dry, and optional as best)
1 teaspoon of sugar (preferably palm or normal)

instructions: We cut chicken breast into thin cuts or small pieces to get them chewed and juicy

En una olla grande, ponemos el caldo de pollo a calentar junto con el lemongrass aplastado, la galanga en rodajas y las hojas de lima kaffir. Dejamos que hierva suavemente unos 5 minutos para que suelten todo su aroma
We add coconut milk and move carefully so that it doesn't cut. We let them get hot again without getting a high boiling

We put in the laminated mushrooms, cut chicken and chili (whole if we just want to taste, minced if we want more intensity). We cook everything together for about 10 minutes, till chicken's made and tender mushrooms
We added fish and sugar. We have tested and adjusted salt if necessary
Just before we put out the fire, we add the lime juice to keep his freshness We serve hot with some fresh cilantro chopped up

tomato-tarte-tatin.name: Tomato Tarte Tatin

ingredients.item: Sheet frozen puff pastry (half of 17.3-ounce package)
ingredients.prep: thawed, corners cut off to make very rough 9- to 10-inch round

instructions: Preheat oven to 218°C. Bring large saucepan of water to boil. Cut shallow X in bottom of each tomato. Add 4 tomatoes to boiling water. Blanch tomatoes just until skins at X begin to peel back, 15 to 30 seconds. Using slotted spoon, transfer blanched tomatoes to bowl of ice water to cool quickly. Repeat with remaining tomatoes. Peel tomatoes. Cut out cores, halve lengthwise, and remove seeds.

Spread butter over bottom of 91/2-inch-diameter, 2- to 3-inch-deep ovenproof skillet (preferably cast-iron). Sprinkle 3/4 cup sugar over butter. Arrange tomato halves, rounded side down and close together, in concentric circles in skillet to fill completely.

Place skillet over medium heat. Cook until sugar and butter are reduced to thickly bubbling, deep amber syrup (about 1/4 inch deep in bottom of skillet), moving tomatoes occasionally to prevent burning, about 25 minutes. Remove skillet from heat. Immediately drizzle vanilla over tomatoes. Top with pastry round. Using knife, tuck in edges of pastry. Cut 2 or 3 small slits in pastry. Place skillet in oven and bake tart until pastry is deep golden brown, about 24 minutes.

Cool tart in skillet 10 minutes. Cut around sides of skillet to loosen pastry. Place large platter over skillet. Using oven mitts as aid, hold skillet and platter firmly together and invert, allowing tart to settle onto platter. Carefully lift off skillet. Rearrange any tomato halves that may have become dislodged.
Serve tart warm or at room temperature with whipped cream.

tramezzini-argiro.name: Tramezzini

ingredients.item: 6 large slices of bread for toast without crust
100 gr turkey in thin slices (or air salami)
6 large slices of bread for toast without crust
100 gr turkey in thin slices (or air salami)

instructions: For tramezini, spread the slices of bread on the counter.
With the molder open the slices of bread rolling to make them thin and grow their surface.
Brush with fresh cream cheese, sprinkle with chives and add the air salami.
Close the bread on a tight roll. Wrap it tightly and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Beat the eggs in a bowl. Unwrap the tramezzini rolls from the membrane.
We dip them in the beaten egg. We're going to toast. We put all the rolls on non-stick paper.
Heat the oil in a large pan and weigh the tramezzini from all sides for a few minutes.
We take them out on absorbent paper.
Serve them with season salad, warm and delicious.
Tramezzini are sandwiches with whatever stuffing you like. They are usually cut into triangles or wrap them in a role and after freezing to stabilise the role you cut it into thin slices.
Tramezzini with crispy crust like what I show you is a delicious snack for all hours. Enjoy the warm and crispy once they're fried.

tuna-empanada.name: Tuna Empanada

ingredients.item: High-quality canned spanish tuna packed in olive oil
Thinly sliced serrano ham or prosciutto

instructions: Heat oil in heavy medium skillet over medium-high heat. Add tomatoes, pepper, onion, and garlic; sprinkle with salt and pepper and sauté until vegetables are soft, stirring often, about 10 minutes. Transfer to bowl. Add tuna and sliced eggs; toss gently to distribute evenly. Season filling with salt and pepper; set aside to cool completely.

Spray rimless baking sheet with nonstick spray. Roll out 1 pastry sheet on floured surface to 12x16-inch rectangle. Transfer to baking sheet. Arrange ham over pastry, leaving 1-inch border. Spread filling atop ham, leaving 1-inch border. Brush pastry edges with beaten egg. Roll out second pastry sheet to 12x15-inch rectangle. Place atop filling, pressing on edges to seal. Fold 1/2 inch of bottom pastry edge up over top pastry; crimp edges to seal. Brush top with beaten egg. Cut eight 2-inch slashes in top pastry. DO AHEAD Can be made 4 hours ahead. Cover; chill.
Preheat oven to 232°C. Bake empanada uncovered until crust is browned and crisp, about 25 minutes. Slide onto platter.

turkey-fillet-argiro.name: Turkey Fillet
instructions: Cut the turkey fillet into thin slices and place it in a bowl.
Add the olive oil, the smooth tomatoes, soy sauce, balsamic cream, oregano, garlic, honey and freshly ground pepper to the blender. Beat well until a smooth, homogeneous marinade is created.
Pour the turkey with the mixture and mix to cover all slices.
Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 1 hour. The longer she stays in marinade, the more tender and delicious she gets.
Heat a grill and make the turkey slides for 3–4 minutes on each side, until golden.
Alternatively: Bake in the oven, in a baking pan lined with parchment paper, at 200
Serve with green salad, tomatoes and mozzarella for a complete meal.

turkey-shawarma-with-crunchy-vegetables.name: Turkey Shawarma With Crunchy Vegetables

ingredients.item: Mixed tender herbs (such as torn mint leaves
ingredients.prep: parsley leaves with tender stems, and/or dill fronds)

instructions: Mix yogurt, garlic, lemon zest, and 2 tsp. lemon juice in a medium bowl; season with salt. Set yogurt sauce aside.

Mix black pepper, coriander, cumin, paprika, cinnamon, turmeric, and cayenne in a small bowl. Heat 2 Tbsp. butter and 1 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium. As soon as butter is melted, add half of spice mixture and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add half of turkey meat and toss to coat. Transfer to a large bowl. Repeat with remaining 2 Tbsp. butter, 1 Tbsp. oil, spice mixture, and turkey meat. Add remaining 1 tsp. lemon juice to turkey mixture and toss to combine.
Toss onion, cucumbers, carrot, radishes, and vinegar in a large bowl to combine. Add herbs, season with salt, and gently toss again.

Cut 1" off top of each pita and stuff back into pocket, nudging it all the way to the bottom. Spread some of the yogurt sauce inside each pita without tearing sides and fill with turkey and vegetable mixture. Serve with hot sauce and remaining yogurt sauce.

turkey-steaks-with-ham-and-spinach-telec.name: Turkey Steaks With Ham And Spinach
turkey-steaks-with-ham-and-spinach-telec.original_name: Bifes de peru com fiambre e espinafres
instructions: Descasque e lave os dentes de alho e pique-os finamente. Arranje os bifes. Leve ao lume um tacho com o azeite, junte os dentes de alho e os espinafres e deixe saltear muito bem, mexendo sempre. Tempere com sal e pimenta, retire e reserve.
Disponha uma fatia de fiambre e um pouco de espinafres em cada bife, depois enrole e prenda com um palito.
Numa frigideira derreta a manteiga, junte os bifes e deixe corar de ambos os lados.
Water with the white wine and let it cook some more until the sauce evaporates. Remove and serve decorated with rosemary or taste.

turkey-stuffed-with-fruit-recipe-comeder.name: Turkey Stuffed With Fruit Recipe
turkey-stuffed-with-fruit-recipe-comeder.original_name: Receta de pavo relleno de frutas
instructions: El pavo para esta receta debe estar fresco, suave y limpio por dentro. Condimenta con sal y pimienta al gusto muy bien.
With a syringe, inject into the turkey with cognac, especially into his thighs and breasts.
Baits the turkey with olive oil till well tipped.
Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
Pela la cebolla y corta en cuadritos. Haz lo propio con el pimiento.
Warm a frying pan with olive oil, scrape onion and garlic teeth for 2 minutes. Add the pepper and leap for 3 more minutes.
It incorporates apples cut into cubes, cranberries and raisins. Fits with salt and pepper and provenous herbs. Mix and cook for about 4 minutes.
Apaga el fuego e incorpora el pan molido y las nueces. Mezcla hasta que todo se integre.
Rellena el pavo con esta mezcla y coloca en una bandeja engrasada.
Vierte el vino blanco con unas ramitas de romero.
Hornea at 160 ° C for about 2 hours or more. The Turkey should be tender and very soft.
Una vez listo, lo sirves para que tus comensales tomen sus porciones favoritas.

tuscan-kale-caesar-slaw.name: Tuscan Kale Caesar Slaw

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Combine the first 4 ingredients in a blender; purée until smooth. With machine running, slowly add oil, drop by drop, to make a creamy dressing. Transfer dressing to a bowl and stir in 1/4 cup Parmesan. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Cover and chill. DO AHEAD Dressing can be made 2 days ahead. Keep chilled.

Separate egg white from yolk. Place egg white in a coarse-mesh strainer set over a bowl. Press egg white through strainer with the back of a spoon; scrape egg white from bottom of strainer. Repeat with egg yolk, using a clean strainer and bowl. DO AHEAD Can be made 6 hours ahead. Cover bowls separately and chill.
Toss kale and dressing in a large bowl to coat. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Top with remaining 1/4 cup Parmesan and sieved eggs.
